title: Session Recorder Report
description: JSON Schema for validating session-recorder final reports.

task_description.description: One-sentence description of the user's task/goal.

description.description: Brief description of what the skill does.

content.description: Full content of the skill (SKILL.md body or equivalent). Use escaped newlines for multi-line content.

install_command.description: Command to install this skill (e.g. 'npx skills add vercel-labs/skills@find-skills -g -y'). null if built-in or no install needed.

source.description: Where this skill comes from (e.g. 'superpowers plugin', 'vercel-labs/skills', 'local ~/.agents/skills/'). null if unknown.

skills.description: List of skills used during the session, including their full content and installation metadata.

execution_plan.description: Numbered step-by-step execution plan as a single string. Each step on its own line, separated by \n. Format: '1. Phase: Detail — key decisions, outcome\n2. Phase: Detail...'. Include skills used, key decisions, and errors per step inline.

is_successful.description: Whether the task was completed successfully. true = resolved, false = abandoned/failed/unresolved.

error_message.description: ALL errors encountered during the session concatenated with newlines. Includes: tool failures, user-reported issues, user corrections, runtime errors, AI mistakes. Format: '[Turn N] source: description'. Set to empty string only if zero errors occurred. Populated regardless of is_successful value.
